feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Request to change Business Partner Category
entry.content:
The business partner category is incorrect. Request to change business partner category


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Need to define Ledger Group HANA Public cloud
entry.content:
Hello Members ,

We have received one requirement in public cloud  " Define Group ledger " functionality.

Currently in Private cloud we are using Group ledger functionality and Group ledger assigned to our Local Accounting principal and client want to use same functionality in Public cloud.

Our client requirement is "  ledgers in our public cloud system where leading ledger should be 0L and assigned to Accounting principle US GAAP and wanted to create another ledger group LG which consists of two ledgers R1 and L1 where R1 should be the representative ledger in the group and L1 Should be non-representative ledger and this ledger group LG should be assigned to accounting principle Local GAAP.

Could you pls help us how we can achieve in HANA Public cloud ?

 

 

 

Thank you 

JP

entry.title: No Jobs in App Schedule Accruals Jobs - F3778
entry.content:
Hi for all the users we cant find the jobs in Schedule accrual jobs

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Subscription Billing - Price per unit per month, but billed quarterly
entry.content:
We have a customer that for each Recurring Rate Element have a montly price per number of users, but they use a quartly billing cycle. We have not found a way so far for how the Lookup table entries for Recurring Price should be enered to achive this, or how we can create the Rate Plan Template to acheive this. The single price per unit we enter in the lookup table will automatically be price per units for the billing cycle (quarterly, and not monthly as we want).

Any advice or example would be appreciated.

entry.title: Error - Actual Assessment is replaced by Universal Allocation
entry.content:
When trying to access the App - 'Create Overhead Allocation Cycles - Cost Centers - Actual' (KSU1) the following error is returned - 

Actual Assessment is replaced by Universal Allocation. See text.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Is it possible to perform GR for Purchase order automatically (mouvement 101) in sap public cloud ?
entry.content: Is it possible to perform GR for Purchase order automatically (mouvement 101) in sap public cloud ?

entry.title: FDA tracking with S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi team,

do you know how do we ensure that an Public Cloud ERP system (S/4 Hana Cloud Public Edition) can be compliant with FDA or CSA Certifications ?

whether it's for Consumer Products, cosmestics or Healthcare/Medcare, how do we tackle this issue ?

Thanks !

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: Supplier Batch CDS Views for S/4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

Currently I'm looking for Supplier Batch field to use in my customized PO Forms, had search around few days, still not able to view the Released CDS Views to have this field.

In ME23N - the filed name is LICHA

Already search in below CDS View

I_PurchaseOrderItemAPI01,

I_BATCH,

I_PurchasingDocumentItem

 

Thanks

 


Any suggestions and help will be appreciated.

entry.title: 使用哪个迁移模版可以批量修改客商主数据，历时迁移的客商数据
entry.content:
应该用哪个迁移模版进行修改呢


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Transport of Flexible workflow containing "Teams"
entry.content:
Dear Community members,

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_MARKETING_CLOUD/e0cd7c1ecf3d4f2f9feb46ec1c5b68fb/647ec99192b249659b4e6f00a27d925e.html?locale=en-US&version=2408.500

This SAP Help page describes how to transport workflow scenarios by using Software Collection in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

However, if you refer any "Team" in workflow definition, you may face error message "Workflow referencing teams are not transportable" when you try to export the workflow in Export Software Collection app.
And also, it is not possible to transport Teams and Responsibilities as user id is different in each system.

If you have experience of implementing flexible workflow in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, please share your experience or idea how to transport/reflect the workflow contents from D/Q system to T/P system.

Do you know any efficient way to transport workflows?
Do you re-create workflows in P system?
Do you use workflows only referring roles instead of teams?
Your information will be very appreciated!

Sincerely,
T.I

entry.title: Can I create Adaptation Project from my custom Fiori element (Analytic List Report Template) ?
entry.content:
Hi,
 I have created my new custom Fiori Element Application that uses Analytic List Report Template
My new custom application is deployed on SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud Edition
Then, I try to use BAS to create a new Adaptation Project to extend my custom Fiori Element app
but I cannot find my custom Fiori Element App on the list to select
Is there anything I need to configure my app before making it in a project type of cloudReady?
or make it available on the selection list

Thank you,
Pakorn

entry.title: Sales return orders automatically generate delivery note
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I would like to know if there is any scheduling APP that can automatically generate a delivery note if a return sales order is required in the app?

Thank you~

entry.title: Custom approval workflow required for timesheet entries in SAP public cloud
entry.content:
Hi HCM experts,

Employee master is directly being integrated through  3rd party ADP, for timesheet approval they have custom approval logic which they want to implement. 

e.g for senior operator approval should go through their manager and then through HR.

Is it possible to implement such a logic for different data profiles in SAP cloud

entry.title: How can I read peoject and WBS balance?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We want to find our project and WBS amounts. Which CDS keep this information? or which API can give it?

Thank you for your help 

Regards

entry.title: Payment reference
entry.content:
Hello,

when trying to post a AR document I receive the following error message. Our company is in Germany, the vendor we want to post to is in DK.

This is the message we receive: "Payment reference INV1234 is not correct for country Denmark"

Is it possible to change this message or setting?

Regards

Desiree

entry.title: Re: how to find SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition DB size
entry.content: If the systems are connected into C-ALM, you can configure the Health Monitoring function and check the history of the DB size, for each tenant.

entry.title: WBS Element to Control Budgeting(Capex)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Expert,

On ECC 6.0, My client uses internal order for controlling purchase assets(Capex)

Currently, the S/4Hana Public cloud removes the internal order function.

My client requested to control budgeting for purchase Assets (Capex). 

- I use WBS to control the budget, but when I import WBS for budget the system requests input G/L Account.

  Can I import directly to WBS?

- The public cloud support "Overall" planning or not.

Please recommendation.

Thanks,

May

entry.title: Extend Validity of E-Waybill
entry.content:
How to extend the validity of E-Waybill?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Downpayment request from sales order for US not being cleared by incoming payment
entry.content:
We have an issue with DP request for US where the tax calculation happens via taxjar integration and tax code config in SAP has 0%. The DP request created from sales order billing cannot be cleared with incoming payment with the following error message - Tax entry not possible in this item (Message no. FF724). However, the F2 invoice document can be cleared with incoming payment which means all our downpayments for US remains uncleared. This works fine for non-US company code where system is calculating the tax. 

However, if we try to create a manual FI DP request for US with some tax value and clear the same with incoming payment, this works fine. 

The issue happens only when we try to get it integrated with SD with FAZ doc type for DP req and it is not letting us go ahead in clearing the DP request with payment as in any normal std flow.

entry.title: How is the delivery plant determined in a sales order
entry.content:
There is a requirement to know how values for the delivery plant are determined when creating a sales order.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
